title: ⚠️ Trade Offer!! ⚠️
description: insanely useless mod that adds the "trade offer" meme into the villager gui
body:
### Have you ever wanted to have stupid memes in your villager UI? **LOOK NO FURTHER!**

**Trade Offer** adds the stupid "Trade Offer" meme to your local villager trading UI! Now, you can trade with confidence!
